mapper.select: SELECT project_id AS "projectId", project_name AS "projectName", location AS "location", description AS "description", camera_url AS "cameraUrl", status AS "status", COALESCE(mode, 'SAFETY') AS "mode", TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "createdAt" FROM safe_project ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT project_id AS "projectId", project_name AS "projectName", location AS "location", description AS "description", camera_url AS "cameraUrl", status AS "status", COALESCE(mode, 'SAFETY') AS "mode", TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "createdAt" FROM safe_project WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO safe_project (project_id, project_name, location, description, camera_url, status, mode) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{projectName}, #{location}, #{description}, #{cameraUrl}, #{status}, #{mode})
mapper.update: UPDATE safe_project SET project_name = #{projectName}, location = #{location}, description = #{description}, camera_url = #{cameraUrl}, status = #{status}, mode = #{mode}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.select: SELECT m.mapping_id AS "mappingId", m.project_id AS "projectId", p.project_name AS "projectName", m.sensor_location AS "sensorLocation", m.sensor_alias AS "sensorAlias", TO_CHAR(m.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "createdAt" FROM safe_iot_mapping m JOIN safe_project p ON p.project_id = m.project_id ORDER BY p.project_name ASC, m.sensor_location ASC

SELECT m.mapping_id AS "mappingId", m.project_id AS "projectId", p.project_name AS "projectName", m.sensor_location AS "sensorLocation", m.sensor_alias AS "sensorAlias", TO_CHAR(m.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "createdAt" FROM safe_iot_mapping m JOIN safe_project p ON p.project_id = m.project_id WHERE m.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY m.sensor_location ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO safe_iot_mapping (mapping_id, project_id, sensor_location, sensor_alias) VALUES (#{mappingId}, #{projectId}, #{sensorLocation}, #{sensorAlias}) ON CONFLICT (project_id, sensor_location) DO NOTHING
